name: Jeweled Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: TASTE OF HOME DEC/JAN 1996
1. In a mixing bowl, cream butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Combine flour and baking soda in a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the creamed mixture, stirring until combined.
5. Stir in raisins, nuts, cherries, and pineapple; mix well.
6. Shape the dough into 2-inch rolls and wrap in waxed paper or foil.
7. Freeze the rolls for at least 2 hours.
8. Cut the frozen rolls into 1/4-inch slices.
9. Place the sliced cookies on a greased baking sheet.
10. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 8-10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
11. Cool on wire racks.
Yield: 12-14 dozen
